heading: Establishment of boundaries for certain component rivers in Alaska; withdrawal of minerals
label: 1285b Establishment of boundaries for certain component rivers in Alaska; withdrawal of minerals
notes: References in TextThe Alaska National Interest Lands Conservation Act, referred to in par. (2), is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 96–48794 Stat. 2371section 3101 of this titleDec. 2, 1980
amendments: References in TextThe Alaska National Interest Lands Conservation Act, referred to in par. (2), is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 96–48794 Stat. 2371section 3101 of this titleDec. 2, 1980

children.text: the boundary of each such river shall include an average of not more than six hundred and forty acres per mile on both sides of the river. Such boundary shall not include any lands owned by the State or a political subdivision of the State nor shall such boundary extend around any private lands adjoining the river in such manner as to surround or effectively surround such private lands; and

the withdrawal made by paragraph (iii) of shall apply to the minerals in Federal lands which constitute the bed or bank or are situated within one-half mile of the bank of any river designated a wild river by the Alaska National Interest Lands Conservation Act.section 1280(a) of this title
